prompt: I have a CSV file with 5,386 voice bot calls for an e-commerce support system. The data includes call duration, issue category, resolution status, CSAT scores, and friction points. I need to understand customer sentiment patterns - specifically which issue types are driving the most negative sentiment and why. Can you analyze this and give me an Excel report I can share with the leadership team?

assertions.name: excel-file-generated
assertions.description: Excel workbook file is successfully created

assertions.name: contains-5-sheets
assertions.description: Excel file contains all 5 required analysis sheets

assertions.name: sentiment-analysis-present
assertions.description: Issue Type Analysis sheet shows sentiment breakdown

assertions.name: call-ids-present
assertions.description: All Calls Data sheet includes Call_ID column for auditing

assertions.name: csat-scores-included
assertions.description: CSAT Analysis sheet has CSAT Score data with call references
